description: Add flipArcState(a) helper used by the degenerate-pivot branch of updateTree.
commit: feat: add arc-state flip helper for degenerate pivots
steps: Implement `func (s *state) flipArcState(a int)`: if arcState[a] == stateLower set to stateUpper; if stateUpper set to stateLower; if stateTree leave unchanged (document that this is never called on a tree arc in practice but the method is still defined defensively).

Create solver_tree_flip_test.go with `TestFlipArcState`: construct state literal with arcState=[]int8{stateLower, stateUpper, stateTree}; call flipArcState(0), flipArcState(1), flipArcState(2); assert arcState == [stateUpper, stateLower, stateTree]; call flipArcState(0) again and assert it returns to stateLower.
acceptance_criteria: TestFlipArcState asserts both directions (Lower->Upper and Upper->Lower) and that stateTree is unchanged.
